calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2011 Continued To Nov-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Michael Begert, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: C. Yount #2737

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in the court file.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants Gage Excavating, LLC and Justin Gage as follows:

Damages/Principal - $160,320.14
Attorney Fees - $2,500.00
Pre-judgment Interest - $7,378.356
Costs - $470.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $170,668.70
Plaintiff is also entitled to the leased equipment listed in the Judgement, see scanned doc. for details.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2011 Continued To Sep-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
